summary: Lead accepted SIM-003 after validating the writer REVIEW handoff, systems_architect REQUEST_CHANGES handoff, writer fix handoff, and final systems_architect ACCEPT handoff. Integration gates passed for sim-core tests, protocol tests, deterministic Node/Worker canaries, architecture guard, typecheck, lint, full tests, aggregate check, frozen install, targeted formatting, task validation, JSON parsing, duplicate thread checks, and route evidence. SIM-003 remains ACCEPTED rather than CLOSED until the implementation PR enters main.

tests_run.result: Final systems_architect ACCEPT handoff is valid.
Vitest passed 1 file / 3 tests for protocol command/query schema validation.
Node hash 61e0ba1c matched Worker-compatible hash 61e0ba1c; Node command/query hash d275faa4 matched Worker-compatible command/query hash d275faa4.
Architecture boundaries passed; self-test fixture produced 15 expected violations.
SIM-003 task JSON is valid after ACCEPTED status update.
All four SIM-003 writer/reviewer handoffs are schema-valid.
SIM-003 recorded two spawn_agent routes, three send_input routes with real submission IDs, and both child close records with real thread IDs.
Vitest passed 5 files / 27 tests, including command/query validation and read-model alias isolation coverage.
All workspace package typecheck scripts passed.
ESLint completed with no reported violations.
Active SIM-003 writer/reviewer thread IDs were present before closure and duplicateThreadIds was empty.
All 12 workspace projects were already up to date; lockfile integrity passed.
architecture:check, sim:determinism, root Vitest 8 files / 33 tests, and web Vitest 1 file / 3 tests passed.

tests_run.command: pnpm exec prettier --check apps/sim-runner/src/run-determinism.mjs apps/web/src/worker/hello-simulation-adapter.d.mts apps/web/src/worker/hello-simulation-adapter.mjs packages/protocol/package.json packages/protocol/src/index.ts packages/sim-core/package.json packages/sim-core/src/index.ts packages/sim-core/src/command-query-v1.ts tests/sim-core-command-query.test.ts tests/protocol-command-query-schema.test.ts tests/sim-command-worker-contract.test.ts
tests_run.result: All explicitly checked SIM-003 touched files use Prettier code style.
format:check, lint, typecheck, and architecture:check passed.
SIM-003 is ACCEPTED; SIM-001, SIM-002, and SIM-004 are CLOSED.
With SIM-003 ACCEPTED on this branch, dependency-ready draft task is SIM-006.

decisions: Accept SIM-003 because systems_architect returned ACCEPT after a real REQUEST_CHANGES cycle and lead integration gates passed.
Keep SIM-003 at ACCEPTED until this branch is merged into main; CLOSED requires actual main integration.
Do not start SIM-006 before SIM-003 implementation PR is integrated and main is reconciled.
Track the root pnpm format:check package-source coverage gap as a non-blocking follow-up risk; SIM-003 direct touched-file Prettier checks passed.
risks: Root pnpm format:check still omits packages/sim-core and packages/protocol globs; targeted SIM-003 Prettier checks mitigate this task, but a follow-up task should close the general false-negative.
Worker-compatible command/query coverage uses the existing Node worker-compatible adapter level rather than a browser Dedicated Worker bootstrap, matching current M1 acceptance scope.
requested_action: Create the SIM-003 implementation commit and PR, wait for checks, merge only after gates pass, then reconcile main and close SIM-003 in a separate integration-closure step.
